entity.summary: Decentralized exchange protocol using signed request-for-quote pricing from professional market makers rather than constant-product AMM curves, enabling protected quoted-price execution across supported networks.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Hashflow's DeFi-native RFQ model, off-chain pricing functions, cryptographically signed quotes, and slippage/MEV protections. Exact launch date is not asserted in this initial bundle.

evidence.title: Hashflow Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation explains Hashflow's RFQ-based decentralized exchange model, market-maker pricing, signed quotes, and execution protections.

evidence.title: Hashflow official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application domain remains available and serves as the public Hashflow trading entry point.

evidence.title: Hashflow DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry corroborates Hashflow as a decentralized exchange venue; first-party documentation remains the protocol and status authority.
